overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person driving sequence through Night City's neon-lit streets. The clip begins stationary at a rain-slicked intersection with towering holographic billboards, then proceeds through covered walkways and tunnels before emerging onto open boulevards with futuristic architecture and large advertising towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial intersection with holographic billboards

events.description: building arch lights shift from cyan to magenta purple
black sedan passes through intersection from left to right
begins driving forward into the intersection

agents.ego_description: stationary at intersection observing neon-lit street and passing traffic, then accelerates forward

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large rectangular billboard with 'SET SAIL FOR EUROPA' text and orange graphics
vertical neon sign with Japanese characters 'テル' and 'IHO' lettering
building facade with glowing arched entryways that cycle through colors
elevated highway or walkway with illuminated structural supports

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a rain-slicked Night City intersection at night, dominated by towering holographic billboards and neon signs. The camera sits stationary as a car passes through the intersection and the building lights shift colors, then begins to drive forward into the neon-lit street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under commercial buildings

events.description: enters covered walkway beneath building overpass
pedestrians crossing on yellow striped crosswalk ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through the intersection and entering a covered walkway with illuminated shopfronts on the sides

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking across the yellow crosswalk

entered.detail: concrete overpass ceiling with fluorescent strip lighting
storefront with red neon trim and large glass windows
yellow striped zebra crossing markings on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives forward into a covered pedestrian zone beneath commercial buildings, passing pedestrians on crosswalks. The environment shifts from open neon-lit streets to a more enclosed walkway with artificial lighting and shopfronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel underpass transitioning to open street

events.description: enters darker tunnel section with artificial strip lighting
exits tunnel into open street with visible sky and buildings
turns right at intersection following the road curve

agents.ego_description: navigating through the tunnel underpass, then emerging into open streets and making a right turn at the intersection

notable_agents.action: black car waiting at the intersection on the right side

entered.detail: concrete tunnel walls with neon accent lighting
flat concrete ceiling with linear fluorescent lights
modern building with reflective glass facade and red structural trim
tall street lamp with bright white LED light

segments.scene_description: Driving through a tunnel section with artificial lighting before emerging back into the open city streets. The vehicle makes a right turn at an intersection, passing modern glass buildings with neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial boulevard with holographic advertising towers

events.description: sky visible with dawn light mixing with neon city lights

agents.ego_description: cruising along the multi-lane boulevard, passing futuristic billboards and elevated highways

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead in the same lane on the boulevard

entered.detail: large cylindrical tower structure wrapped with rotating digital advertisements
raised concrete highway ramp with vehicles traveling above
tall skyscrapers visible on the horizon against the dawn sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows driving along a wide commercial boulevard with massive holographic billboards and futuristic architecture. The lighting transitions from pure neon to a mix with natural dawn light as the distant skyline becomes visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving sequence that transitions from a rain-slicked neon intersection into the expansive, dawn-lit boulevards of Night City. It begins stationary amidst towering holographic billboards and shifting colored lights before accelerating forward into the vibrant street. As the vehicle moves, the open city environment narrows into a covered pedestrian zone filled with shopfronts and artificial lighting, which then leads directly into a dimly lit tunnel. The scene opens back up as the car emerges from the tunnel and makes a right turn past modern glass buildings with neon accents. Finally, the path expands onto a wide commercial boulevard where the intense neon glow blends with the soft light of a distant dawn skyline.
